title: anisotome lanuginosa
intro: Anisotome lanuginosa, also known as hairy anisotome, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand and eastern Australia, belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Anisotome lanuginosa include its ability to soothe and calm the respiratory system, reduce inflammation, and provide relief from congestion. Anisotome lanuginosa can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing individuals to harness its medicinal properties and experience its health benefits.
